race.comment: TENNESSEE WHISKEY (8) looks close to a win. Has raced twice in Darwin and found one better both times. Now out to his best trip and expected to go close. ICHIBAN (2) looks the biggest danger. Placed in the Alice Springs Cup four back then has a win and two placings since over sharper trips. Now back out to 2000m and looks tough to beat. GRINZINGER BISHOP (6) has had three runs since finishing fifth in the Alice Springs Cup. Extra trip is a plus and can improve sharply. VANGUARD LEGEND (5) is super consistent at this circuit and is a strong contender on his best form. KING AKEED (7) is ready to peak after three runs back and is among the chances.
